{{Relic Infobox|Lee's Waffle???|2}}{{R|Lee's Waffle???||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. It is a weaker version of {{R|Lee's Waffle||2}}. Upon pickup, it heals 10% of the player's max HP.

== Sources ==
Can be bought from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. Also can be obtained upon defeating the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]] in combat.
